nasb.text: When he had finished speaking, he threw the jawbone from his hand; and he named that place Ramath-lehi.

esv.text: As soon as he had finished speaking, he threw away the jawbone out of his hand. And that place was called Ramath-lehi.

cnv.text: 說完了，就把那腮骨從手裡拋出去，因此那地方就叫拉末．利希。

ccb.text: 说完，他扔掉了手中的驴腮骨。因此，那地方叫拉末·利希。
